## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Wipey version**: (e.g. 1.0.0)
- **macOS version**: (e.g. macOS 14.2 Sonoma)
- **Mac model**: (e.g. MacBook Pro M2)
- **Installation method**: Homebrew / Direct download / Built from source

## Additional context
Any logs, screenshots, or other context.
